name: code-reviewer
description: Framework-aware AI reviews (Python, JS/TS, PHP). Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, or local models. Save API keys in Settings. Usage & cost tracking.

commands.title: Code Reviewer: Reset Usage Session Totals

enumDescriptions: Custom / local OpenAI-compatible API (Ollama, LM Studio, vLLM, etc.)
codeReviewer.provider.description: Default LLM provider for workspace reviews.

codeReviewer.apiKey.markdownDescription: API key for the **currently selected** provider. Also mirrored when you save a key from the panel. Per-provider keys: `claudeApiKey`, `openaiApiKey`, `geminiApiKey`, `customApiKey`.

codeReviewer.claudeApiKey.markdownDescription: [Anthropic](https://console.anthropic.com/) API key. Stored locally in user settings.

codeReviewer.openaiApiKey.markdownDescription: [OpenAI](https://platform.openai.com/api-keys) API key. Stored locally in user settings.

codeReviewer.geminiApiKey.markdownDescription: [Google AI Studio](https://aistudio.google.com/apikey) Gemini API key. Stored locally in user settings.

codeReviewer.customApiKey.markdownDescription: API key for custom/local endpoint (optional — Ollama often needs none).

codeReviewer.customBaseUrl.markdownDescription: OpenAI-compatible API base URL (e.g. Ollama `http://localhost:11434/v1`, LM Studio `http://localhost:1234/v1`).
